go over.translate: 1) Просматривать, проверять 2) Переходить (к другой стороне, теме)
examples: Let's go over to the next topic.
We need to go over the details.
She went over the document carefully.
He went over to the enemy.
They went over to the new system.
She went over to his house.
He went over his notes before the exam.
Let's go over the plan one more time.
Go over your work before submitting.
He went over to the other side.
example_translate: Он просмотрел свои заметки перед экзаменом.
go over.synonyms:
Просматривать, проверять - review, examine, check
Переходить (к другой стороне, теме) - cross, move to, switch
